title: AGENTOBS CachePayload
description: RFC-0001 §7.2 — Payload for semantic cache events in the llm.cache.* namespace. Covers four event types: llm.cache.hit, llm.cache.miss, llm.cache.evicted, llm.cache.written. Semantic caches reduce both latency and cost when prior model responses can be reused for semantically equivalent queries.

CacheHitPayload.title: CacheHitPayload
CacheHitPayload.description: Payload for llm.cache.hit — a prior cached response was returned without a new model call.

key_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the cache lookup key (typically a hash of the canonical prompt). Stored as 64 lowercase hex characters without prefix.

namespace.description: Logical cache namespace or partition. Allows multiple models, tenants, or contexts to share a cache store without key collision.

similarity_score.description: Semantic similarity score between the query and the cached entry (e.g. cosine similarity). 1.0 = exact match.

ttl_remaining_seconds.description: Time-to-live remaining for the cached entry at the time of the hit, in seconds.

cached_model.description: Model that originally produced the cached response.

cost_saved.description: Estimated cost saved by serving from cache instead of calling the model.

tokens_saved.description: Estimated tokens saved by serving from cache.

lookup_duration_ms.description: Time taken to perform the cache lookup in milliseconds.

CacheMissPayload.title: CacheMissPayload
CacheMissPayload.description: Payload for llm.cache.miss — no matching cache entry was found; a new model call will be (or was) made.

key_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the cache lookup key.

best_similarity_score.description: Similarity score of the closest candidate entry, when ANN search was performed. Absent if no candidates existed.

similarity_threshold.description: Minimum similarity threshold configured for this cache. Entries below this score are treated as misses.

lookup_duration_ms.description: Time taken to perform the cache lookup in milliseconds.

CacheEvictedPayload.title: CacheEvictedPayload
CacheEvictedPayload.description: Payload for llm.cache.evicted — an existing cache entry was removed (TTL expiry, LRU eviction, or manual invalidation).

key_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the evicted cache key.

eviction_reason.description: Reason the entry was removed from the cache.

entry_age_seconds.description: Age of the cache entry at the time of eviction, in seconds.

CacheWrittenPayload.title: CacheWrittenPayload
CacheWrittenPayload.description: Payload for llm.cache.written — a new entry was written to the cache after a model call.

key_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the cache key for the new entry.

ttl_seconds.description: Time-to-live for this cache entry in seconds.

response_token_count.description: Token count of the response stored in this cache entry.

cached_model.description: Model that produced the response stored in this cache entry.

write_duration_ms.description: Time taken to write the entry to the cache in milliseconds.
